fun main() {
    println("About Me рҹҗҫ")
    val name = "Qadeer Brahvi"
    println("My name is $name")
    
    val age = 19
    val gender = "Male"
    
    println("Age : $age Years") 
    println("Gender : $gender")
    println("AI & Programming Enthusiast рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’»")
